chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT HYDERABAD CP. No. S- 2156 of 2017 DATED ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 25.01.2018 For orders on office objection For katcha peshi Mr. Muhammad Sachal R. Awan, advocate for petitioner Mr. Wali Muhammad Jamari, Asstt: A.G. Learned counsel for petitioner states that he will be satisfied if learned A.A.G. gives undertaking that the official respondents shall not cause any harassment to the petitioner and shall act strictly in accordance with law. Learned A.A.G. files comments on behalf of official respondents and gives such undertaking that the official respondents shall not cause any harassment to the petitioner and shall act strictly in accordance with law and will provide her legal protection as is provided to the other citizens of this country. Learned counsel for petitioner being satisfied with the undertaking does not press this petition any further which is accordingly disposed of as not pressed. JUDGE karar_hussain /PS*
